# Promptodex Docs

> Documentation for Promptodex — Version Control for AI Prompts

Promptodex is a prompt registry where you can create, fork, share, and version AI prompts. It includes a CLI (pod-cli) and a JavaScript/TypeScript SDK (promptodex).

## Key Pages

- [What is Promptodex](https://docs.promptodex.com/introduction/what-is-promptodex): Overview of the platform
- [Quick Start](https://docs.promptodex.com/quick-start/installation): Get started in under 3 minutes
- [Writing Prompts](https://docs.promptodex.com/writing-prompts/prompt-structure): Template syntax with variables
- [CLI Usage](https://docs.promptodex.com/cli/installation): Run prompts from the terminal with pod-cli
- [SDK Usage](https://docs.promptodex.com/sdk/overview): Load prompts in JavaScript/TypeScript apps
- [API Reference](https://docs.promptodex.com/api/): CLI commands and SDK API reference
- [Template Syntax](https://docs.promptodex.com/api/template-syntax): Variable syntax reference

## Core Concepts

- Prompts are text templates stored in the Promptodex registry
- Variables use double curly brace syntax: {{variableName}}
- Default values: {{variableName:defaultValue}}
- Versions are numbered sequentially; use @version to pin (e.g., summarize@2)
- Prompts can be public (open to everyone) or private (API key required)

## Tools

- **promptodex.com**: Web UI for creating, browsing, forking prompts
- **pod-cli** (npm: pod-cli): CLI to fetch and run prompts; supports piping, variables, multiple AI vendors
- **promptodex** (npm: promptodex): JS/TS library that fetches and renders prompts (does NOT run AI models)
